tag_detail_12600240: This card can trigger explosive damage in response to enemy skills.
tag_detail_12600210: Each hit has a 20% chance to trigger a Thunderfall, dealing damage.
tag_detail_12600215: The current available colors for transformable cards are: <color=#F81532>Red</color>, <color=#026AED>Blue</color>, <color=#63C65E>Green</color>.
tag_detail_12600002: Freezes the target, completely immobilizing them for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600019: Chills the target, halving their Normal Attack Speed for 6 seconds\n10% chance to trigger Freeze.
tag_detail_12600036: Cancels the target's current attack and knocks them back a distance, ineffective against large enemies.
tag_detail_12600045: Cancels the target's current attack and launches them to the backline, ineffective against large enemies.
tag_detail_12600050: Generates a Force Field that reduces incoming damage for all allies. Its duration stacks.
tag_detail_12600053: Makes the target cute, reducing their Attack and Defense by 1% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks.
tag_detail_12600056: Halves the DEF of enemies within range, while increasing their Frost and Physical DMG taken by 25% for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600077: Generates a Barrier that reduces incoming damage for allies in the area, lasting for 5 seconds. Its duration stacks.
tag_detail_12600082: Reduces the target's Defense by 30% for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12600084: Attacks Ricochet between enemies up to 2 times.
tag_detail_12600085: Rapidly burns, dealing the damage from Ignition and Searing Earth within the target area.
tag_detail_12600087: Causes the target to take damage an additional time each time they are hit, excluding damage-over-time effects, for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12600088: Deals damage to the target an additional time; the damage is increased by 50% if the target is Chilled, and by 100% if the target is Frozen.
tag_detail_12600089: During Invulnerability, nullifies all incoming damage, dispels and gains immunity to crowd-control and damage-over-time effects.
tag_detail_12600090: Makes the target Sleep, rendering them unable to engage in combat; during Sleep, the target takes 10% more final damage for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12600149: Stuns the target, rendering them unable to engage in combat for 2 seconds.
tag_detail_12600150: Prevents the target from using normal attacks for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600173: During Blocking, mitigates 80% of the damage taken but unable to perform normal attacks\nGains immunity to Interruption and Stun effects. Using any skill card dispels the Blocking status.
tag_detail_12600185: Sets the entire battlefield on fire, dealing damage to both allies and enemies alike, once every second for 6 seconds\nDispels Chill and Freeze effects from all units.
tag_detail_12600186: Causes the target to take damage once each time they perform a normal attack, up to 5 times.
tag_detail_12600206: Sets the target on fire, dealing damage once every second for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600207: Sets an area on fire, dealing damage to all enemy units within the area once every second for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600208: Triggers a violent explosion, immediately dealing damage equal to 150% of the Ignition, Searing Earth, and Prairie Blaze effects.
tag_detail_12600216: Engulfs a large area in front in flames, dealing damage to all enemy units within the area once every second for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600244: Increases the target's Normal Attack Speed to the maximum and doubles their normal attack damage for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600245: Prevents the target from using skill attacks, allowing only normal attacks for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600268: Attacks can penetrate between enemy units.
tag_detail_12600269: Gives the target a 50% chance to cancel their attack and take damage once with each attack, lasting for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600272: Prevents the target from receiving new healing effects and Attack and Defense buffs for 6 seconds.
tag_detail_12600273: Summons 3 Thunderfalls on the target, dealing damage 3 times\nand triggering Electrification.
tag_detail_12600274: Unleashes an Overhead Blast, dealing damage to the target over 5 hits\nand triggering Electrification.
tag_detail_12600275: Increases the target's final damage taken by 15% for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12600276: Renders the target invisible, making them untargetable for attacks, with the duration stacking upon refresh.
tag_detail_12600277: During Poise, dispels and gains immunity to crowd-control effects.
tag_detail_12600466: Removes the target's Shield, Barrier, and Force Field, while also interrupting the target's Blocking status.
tag_detail_12600482: When playing 2 consecutive Fanning the Flames or Ignition cards, triggers Searing Earth in the front area.\nWhen playing 3 consecutive Fanning the Flames or Ignition cards, triggers Prairie Blaze.\nWhen playing 4 consecutive Fanning the Flames or Ignition cards, triggers Sea of Fire.
tag_detail_12600501: When Butterfly Dance is used consecutively on the same target, increases the healing effect to 3% per second.
tag_detail_12600502: Cards retrieved by Primordial Dream have their next usage cost reduced by 1.
tag_detail_12600504: Fanning the Flames can be used on an ally, causing their next normal attack to trigger Ignition.
tag_detail_12600505:
Cut Flames Bonus Effect:
When Flare successfully deals burning damage,
each Ignition inflicted heals this character for 5% of Max HP;
each Searing Earth inflicted heals this character for 10% of Max HP.
tag_detail_12600507: After Balloon Show explodes, draws 1-2 cards.
tag_detail_12600508: Shock Bombs strike enemies in a larger area and inflict Shield Break.\nShock Bombs are considered Explosive.
tag_detail_12600509: When using Forceful Breakthrough, injects adrenaline and restores 15% of Max HP. Increases this character's Normal Attack Speed to the maximum for 10 seconds.
tag_detail_12600510: After using Shock Bomb, draws a card, prioritizing Shock Bomb.
tag_detail_12600511: When using Quick Reload, injects adrenaline and restores 15% of Max HP. Increases this character's Normal Attack Speed to the maximum for 10 seconds.
tag_detail_12600512: Plop Bomb has a 30% chance to be triggered once more.
tag_detail_12600513: Using Big Red Button increases the final damage of Explosive by 30%.
tag_detail_12600514: Demolition Bonus Effect:\nWhen this card is discarded by a card effect, reduces its cost by 1. This effect stacks.
tag_detail_12600515: When using Tidy Pack, draws a card, prioritizing the ones with Explosive.
tag_detail_12600516: Using Rainbow Flask has a 25% chance for an additional flask.
tag_detail_12600517: Using Rainbow Flask increases the next Green card's healing by 100%. This effect stacks.
tag_detail_12600518: After using Secret Technique: Inner Blade, retrieves all Blade Gale from the discard pile into your hand.
tag_detail_12600519: Using Blade Gale increases this character's Normal Attack Speed by 10%, up to 100%.
tag_detail_12600520: Using Heavy Strike reduces the cost of the next Red card played by 1.
tag_detail_12600521: Using Heavy Strike enables Lightning Heavy Strike to strike one more time during this battle, up to 8 times.
tag_detail_12600522: Using Heavy Strike increases all allies' Attack by 0.5%. This effect stacks.
tag_detail_12600523: After using House Tiger, draws a card.
tag_detail_12600524: If a Red card is discarded by Plumed Feather, it deals 20% more damage during this battle.
tag_detail_12600526: Using Headwind enables all Secret Sword: Slash Return to strike 3 more times during this battle, stacking up to 12 times.
tag_detail_12600527: Heaven's Return Bonus Effect:\nIf the unfolded card is not a Red card, unfold another card.
tag_detail_12600528: Secret Sword: Slash Return Bonus Effect:\nLaunches an additional thrust attack against enemies, dealing damage once and restoring 20% of Max HP.
tag_detail_12600529: The girl is so dangerous'\nUsing Awesome increases the damage dealt by Awesome by 10%.
tag_detail_12600530: Using Phalanx Charge gains additional Mana equal to the number of surviving allies.
tag_detail_12600531: When using Firepower Cover, injects adrenaline and restores 15% of Max HP. Increases this character's Normal Attack Speed to the maximum for 10 seconds.
tag_detail_12600532: Using Phalanx Charge restores 5% of Max HP per second for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12600533: Using Clobber reduces the cost of the next Red card played by 1.
tag_detail_12600534: Upon using Heartshot, gains Poise for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12600535: Gains 5 Mana when Stratagem is discarded.
tag_detail_12600536: When Stratagem is in your hand, reduces the cost of Unfurl in your hand by 1.
tag_detail_12600537: Using Unfurl has a 30% chance for it to return to your hand.

tag_detail_12601466: While EM Field is in effect, all allies take 1% less final damage for every 10,000 Volt Value accumulated, up to a maximum of 50%.
tag_detail_12601467: While Magnet Trap is in effect, whenever an allied backline unit Electrifies enemies 5 times, they gain a 1% Attack bonus. This effect stacks.
tag_detail_12601468: Generates 500 more Volt Value.\nCasting Giga Volt enables all Electrification cards to deal 15% more damage. This effect stacks.
tag_detail_12601714: Increases the target's final damage taken by 15% for 5 seconds.
tag_detail_12601713: Reduces the target's Attack and Defense by 10% for 6 seconds. The affected target loses 1% of Energy per second.
tag_detail_12601711: Doubles the chance for the target to be Electrified for 6 seconds.
text_80608013: Targets the ally with the lowest HP
text_80610278: 以攻击力最高的友方为目标释放
app.title: Consonance Deck Builder
skill_description_12300020: Throw 1 Smoke Grenade, causing all enemies to lose their attack target for #r seconds.\n[Smoke Grenade] is [Explosive].
skill_description_12300059: Deals 7 hits of DMG to all enemies.\nAt the same time, increase Livia's ATK by 1%, stackable.\nThis card has [Consonance]: Its effect varies based on the color of the last card played.
skill_description_12300110: Unleashes a sword wave that <color=#FF6666>[Penetrate]</color> enemies.\nDeals DMG to all enemies once and inflicts <color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color>.\nSword wave is considered [Wave].
skill_description_12300304: Absorbs the energy of nature, restoring #r Cost per second for #r seconds.
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12300025: Cooldown: 30 seconds. Whenever using [Discard] action, reduces the cooldown by 30 seconds; whenever using an [Explosive] card, reduces the cooldown by 5 seconds.
skill_description_12300106: Heals all Front allies for #r of Max HP.\nDraws all [Magic Candy] from your deck to your hand.
skill_description_12300164: Generate the weather [Stellar] and <color=#7AB2FF>[Purge]</color> all allies.\nReduce the Cost of all cards by 1, lasting #r seconds.
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12300301: Cooldown: 25 seconds. Whenever Achiwa's skill card is used, reduces the cooldown by 5 seconds.
skill_description_12300320: Freezes the ground and brandishes the dual hammers, dealing DMG to enemies over 12 hits and inflicting <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>\nAfter using [Shuu], generates an [Element Core: Frost] in your hand.
skill_description_12300321: Shatters the ice wall and strikes the target over 3 hits, each dealing DMG depending on the ice wall's remaining HP. In addition, <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color> the target.\nThis card is [Destroyed] when it leaves your hand.
skill_description_12300417:
Sacrifices #r of current HP, swings [Scarlet Lapis], and transforms [Basic Attack] effect to:
Heals all allies excluding Suen for #r of Max HP, lasting #r seconds. The duration stacks.
When the effect expires, revert [Basic Attack] to the initial effect.
When this card enters the discard pile, there's a 50% chance to generate a [Shadowcraft] in your hand.
Suen's initial [Basic Attack] effect:
Deals DMG to all enemies once, and heals Suen for #r of Max HP.
skill_description_12300419: Activates [Scarlet Lapis] Purging mode, healing all allies for 39% of Max HP and inflicting <color=#7AB2FF>[Purge]</color>. Triggers <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color> on enemy field.
skill_description_12300447: \"Drop the beat!\"\nBox searches through his mini armory.\nRandomly generates a [Pistol], [Assault Rifle] or [Incendiary] in your hand.
skill_description_12300448: \"Life tastes good!\"\nBox whips up a glass of beverage.\nRandomly generates a [Special Black Tea], [Instant Protein Powder] or [Mint Soda] in your hand.
skill_description_12300449: \"I will be back!\"\nBox self-destructs and generates #r [Repair Disk] in your deck.
skill_description_12300461: "It never rains but it pours." Initiates an emergency overhaul and gains [Hyperarmor] for #r seconds. During this period, restores #r HP per second. During [Major Overhaul], cannot use skills of Box Aegis.
skill_description_12300464: \"It's never too early to prepare for a rainy day.\"\nFortifies the aegis, increasing own Max HP by #r and DEF by #r.
skill_description_12300465: \"Punch me if you can~\"\nActivates [Punch Me Mode], reducing all DMG taken by #r for #r seconds.\nDuring this period, taunts all Front enemies, [Interrupt] them and forcing them to attack Box Aegis. Stop taunting when exiting [Punch Me Mode].
skill_description_12300466: \"That's all you've got?\"\nActivates [Tank Mode], reducing all DMG taken by #r for #r seconds.\nDuring this period, taunts all enemies, [Interrupt] them and forcing them to attack Box Aegis. Stop taunting when exiting [Tank Mode].
skill_description_12300515: "Monday is perfect for dozing off" Gain [Sleep]. Summons familiar [Monday]. [Monday] cannot be attacked by enemies. [Monday] inherits Verlaine's ATK. Selects a card from [Fright Night], [Requiem], and [Magic Spring], and adds the selected card to your hand. Afterward, [Dreamseek] is replaced by [Dreamweave].
skill_description_12300568:
Generates a Decoy Balloon in Front line that attracts the enemy's firepower.
Upon explosion, the balloon deals DMG to enemies once and <color=#FF6666>[Stun]</color> them. In addition, triggers <color=#FFB800>[Lightning]</color>.
Decoy Balloon is considered [Explosive].
This card is [Destroyed] when it leaves your hand.
skill_description_12300245: Releases Nova Impact, striking enemies over 4 hits and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color>.\nNova Impact is considered [Wave].
skill_description_12300658: Inflict <color=#FF6666>[Ignite]</color>.\nDispel <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color> if targeting an ally.\nThis card is [Destroyed] when it leaves your hand.

Unleash an Arcane Nova upon the target area, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color>.
This card has [[Elemental Evolution]:
[Nova] and [Element Core: Electro] in your hand will automatically fuse into [Electro Nova]; [Element Core: Fire] into [Fire Nova]; and [Element Core: Frost] into [Frost Nova].
This card has [Lumimorphosis]:
3 [Nova] in your hand will automatically fuse into [Supernova].
[Nova], [Elemental Nova] and [Supernova] are [Waves].
This card is [Destroyed] when used.

Unleash an Electro Nova upon the target area, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color> and <color=#FFB800>[Thunder]</color>.
This card has [Lumimorphosis]:
3 [Nova] in your hand will automatically fuse into [Supernova].
[Nova], [Elemental Nova] and [Supernova] are [Waves].
This card is [Destroyed] when used.
skill_description_12300750:
Unleash a Fire Nova upon the target area, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color> and <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>.
This card has [Lumimorphosis]:
3 [Nova] in your hand will automatically fuse into [Supernova].
[Nova], [Elemental Nova] and [Supernova] are [Waves].
This card is [Destroyed] when used.
skill_description_12300751:
Unleash a Frost Nova upon the target area, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color> and <color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>.
This card has [Lumimorphosis]:
3 [Nova] in your hand will automatically fuse into [Supernova].
[Nova], [Elemental Nova] and [Supernova] are [Waves].
This card is [Destroyed] when used.
skill_description_12300752:
Unleash a Supernova upon the target area, dealing DMG to all enemies once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color>.
Release a neutrino pulse, dealing DMG to all enemies once per second and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Erode]</color>, lasting 5 seconds.
This card has [Elemental Fission]:
For every [Electro Nova] fused into this card, unleash an Electro Meteor, dealing DMG to all enemies once and inflicting <color=#FFB800>[Thunder]</color>.
For [Fire Nova], unleash a Fire Meteor and inflict <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>.
For [Frost Nova], unleash a Frost Meteor and inflict <color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>.
[Nova], [Elemental Nova] and [Supernova] are [Waves].
This card is [Destroyed] when used, then generate 1 [Reverengy] at the bottom of your deck.
skill_detailDescription_12300752: DMG: 15000% (Reverb); Neutrino Pulse 1000% (Reverengy) per hit; Electro Meteor 6000% (Electro); Fire Meteor 6000% (Fire); Frost Meteor 6000% (Frost).

Gain 1 Cost per second.

Increase all allies' ATK and DEF by 10 per second, up to 150.
[Antediluvian Light] is [Wave].
This card is [Destroyed] when used.

Deploys 2 [404] and reactivates all [404] in the discard pile, lasting 10 seconds.
A target is required for deployment.
When targeting enemies, all [404] form an offensive matrix and concentrate firing.
During this period, each [404] deals DMG once per second to enemy units, with a 50% chance to trigger <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>.
When targeting allies, all [404] form a healing matrix and concentrate healing.
During this period, each [404] heals the target for #r of Max HP per second.
[404] is a [Drone].

Destroys a Resonance in your hand and fully restores the target ally's HP.

This card can only be played when you have Resonance in your hand.
This card is Destroyed when played or discarded.

Activates the Deconstruction Box, shuffling all cards in your hand into the deck and drawing 3 cards.
Generates Constructive Flame equal to the number of Red cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Disintegrating Thunder equal to the number of Yellow cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Reconstructive Power equal to the number of Blue cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Reverengy equal to the number of Green cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Purifying Light equal to the number of Purple cards shuffled in your hand.
skill_description_12301504: "Monday, sleep in" Gain [Sleep]. Summon the familiar [Monday] in front, the familiar will not be attacked by enemies. [Monday] inherits Verlaine's ATK. Choose 1 card from [Fright Night] / [Requiem] / [Magic Spring] / [Starry Dream] and add it to your hand. Afterward, [Dreamseek] transforms into [Dreamweave]. [Monday] is a [Familiar], dealing [Basic Attack] of Reverb DMG.
skill_description_12300507: \"Into your heart\"\nLaunch a charged shot, dealing DMG to enemies once and inflicting [Moemoe] and [Sleep].

For each [Berserk], [Corrupt], [Confuse], [Sleep], [Moemoe], [Imprison], [Fetter] and [Curse] effect existing on the battlefield, increase the DMG by 20%.

skill_description_12300668: "Na na na na na na na na na" Grant [Berserk] to all allies. Inflict [Confuse] to all enemies. Call the P.U.S. members to charge at enemies, dealing DMG over multiple hits. This card is [Destroyed] when used.

Each [Crystal Cluster] grants the target a 5% chance of taking double DMG, up to 6 clusters.
When the time expires, trigger [Cluster Blast], each [Crystal Cluster] randomly dealing Fire or Frost DMG once.
[Wyrmmorion] is a [Familiar].

"It never rains but it pours."
Initiates an emergency overhaul and gains <color=#7AB2FF>[Hyperarmor]</color> for 5 seconds.
During this period, restores 10% of Max HP per second for all allied [Mech Units].
During [Major Overhaul], this character's skill cards are unavailable for use.
break_desc_12100295: Using [Boltrain] has a 50% chance to trigger the weather [Drizzle], [Rain], or [Rainstorm]. This effect can be triggered only once.\nWhile the weather [Drizzle], [Rain], or [Rainstorm] is in effect, all allies deal 10% more Electro DMG.
break_desc_12100309: "You can never kill me"\nWhile [Punch Me] is on the battlefield:\nWhenever it loses 30% of its Durability, adds a [Bad] from your deck or discard pile to your hand.
break_desc_12100324: Whenever Hayabusa gains <color=#7AB2FF>[Invisible]</color>, increase his ATK by 3%, up to a maximum of 60%.
break_desc_12100328: 自身处于<color=#7AB2FF>【隐形】</color>状态时，造成的最终伤害提高20%\n同时自身造成的<color=#FF6666>【撕裂】</color>/<color=#FF6666>【斩裂】</color>伤害加倍
break_desc_12100339: For every [Drone] on ally's battlefield, all ally's [Drone] deal 2% more Final DMG.
break_desc_12100355: Using [Oxygen-Rich Atmosphere] has a 50% chance to trigger the weather [Burning], [Melting], or [Boiling]. This effect can be triggered only once.\nWhile the weather [Burning], [Melting], or [Boiling] is in effect, all allies deal 10% more Fire DMG.
break_desc_12100358: When attacked, Lin has a 15% chance to trigger a replica to [Evade] the incoming attack and nullify the damage.
break_desc_12100361: When any ally gains <color=#7AB2FF>[Invisible]</color>, triggers [Swift Bolt].
break_desc_12100386: When using [Kelvin Joke], there is a 50% chance to trigger the weather [Snow], [Snowstorm], or [Blizzard]. This effect can be triggered only once.\nWhile the weather [Snow], [Snowstorm], or [Blizzard] is in effect, all allies deal 10% more Frost DMG.
break_desc_12100530: "Don't make it bad"\nWhenever obtaining Shire's Red card, Jude fires a [Disturbance Bomb] at a random target.
break_desc_12100532: "Make it better"\nIncrease the ATK of allies under <color=#FF6666>[Berserk]</color> effect by 2%, up to a maximum of 50%.\nReduce the DEF of enemies under <color=#B383FF>[Confuse]</color> effect by 2%, up to a maximum of 50%.
break_desc_12100534: "Under your skin"\n对处于<color=#B383FF>【混乱】</color>/<color=#B383FF>【昏睡】</color>/<color=#B383FF>【变萌】</color>/<color=#B383FF>【禁锢】</color>/<color=#B383FF>【枷锁】</color>/<color=#B383FF>【诅咒】</color>状态下的敌方，造成的最终伤害提高30%
break_desc_12100632: 使处于<color=#FF6666>【燎原】</color>下的敌方，受到的最终伤害增加20%\n每施加1层<color=#FF6666>【燎原】</color>，受到的最终伤害额外增加5%，上限6层
break_desc_12100645: 使用【队长技】或得意技能牌时，自身攻击力和防御力+1%，上限50%
break_desc_12100647: 若【黑色药剂】效果结束后，自身生命值大于50%，生成1张【黑色药剂】加入手牌，且能超出手牌上限，但献祭的生命值消耗增加1%\n生命值低于10%时<color=#7AB2FF>【无敌】</color>5秒并回复自身50%生命值，同时从牌库和弃牌区将所有的自身技能牌加入手牌，限1次

talent_desc_12800323:
Enhances Mystery:
Activates the Deconstruction Box, shuffling all cards in your hand into the deck and drawing 3 cards.
Generates Constructive Flame equal to the number of Red cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Disintegrating Thunder equal to the number of Yellow cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Reconstructive Power equal to the number of Blue cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Reverengy equal to the number of Green cards shuffled in your hand.
Generates Purifying Light equal to the number of Purple cards shuffled in your hand.

talent_desc_12800111: Grants this character a 20% chance to dodge incoming attacks.\nWhen dodging successfully, gains 0.5 Cost.

talent_desc_12800152:
Enhance [27 Tauri]:
Summon [27 Tauri], lasting 8 seconds. During this period:
When using a Red card, release a microwave pulse, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Ignite]</color>.
When using a Yellow card, release an electromagnetic pulse, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FFB800>[Lightning]</color>.
When using a Purple card, release a neutrino pulse, dealing DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Erode]</color>.
[27 Tauri] is a [Mech Unit].
Microwave pulse, electromagnetic pulse and neutrino pulse are [Waves].
Afterward, generate a Black card [Reverengy] at the bottom of your deck.
talent_desc_12800156: After using [Nova], gain 0.1 Cost per second, lasting 8 seconds.\nAfter using [Supernova], gain 0.5 Cost per second, lasting 8 seconds.
talent_desc_12800128:
Ushana has 250 Fury maximum.
Whenever Ushana uses [Slash!] or deals the final blow to an enemy, she gains 10 Fury.
Whenever allies inflict <color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color>, she gains 1 Fury.
When her Fury reaches 50, 150 or 250, future [Slash!] additionally inflicts <color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color> 1-2, 2-3 or 3-5 times.
talent_desc_12800244: Enhance [Slash!]:\nWield [Realmbreaker] to deal DMG once and inflict <color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color> 2 to 3 times.\nRandomly inflict <color=#FF6666>[Injure]</color>, <color=#B383FF>[Imprison]</color> or <color=#B383FF>[Fetter]</color>.
talent_desc_12800248: For each Black card in your deck or hand, heal Ushana for 1% of Max HP per second.\nWhen you draw [Reverengy] from the deck, add 1 [Slash!] from the deck or discard pile to your hand, and pierce the enemy with a [Realmbreaker], each dealing Reverengy DMG once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Corrode]</color>.
talent_desc_12800256: <color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color> inflicted by Ushana has a 20% chance to trigger <color=#FF6666>[Corrode]</color>.\nDuring the duration of [Eclipse Realm], increase the trigger rate by 10%.
talent_desc_12800283: During the duration of [Stigmata], gain 0.1 Costs per second.
talent_desc_12800306: After using [Stigmata], gain [Veil of Eclipse], lasting 6 seconds.\nDuring this period, inflict <color=#FF6666>[Erode]</color> on nearby enemies once per second and heal for 100% of the DMG dealt.\nDuring this period, whenever triggering [Stigmata Disintegration], increase the duration by 1 second.
talent_desc_12800311: Whenever drawing [Prologue], draw 1 or 2 cards, prioritizing Raziel's skill card.
talent_desc_12800572: When encountering a wave of enemies, immediately use [Hallucinogenic Gas] once.
talent_desc_12800573:
【黏胶炸弹】增强为：
投掷3枚黏胶炸弹附着随机敌方，持续5秒
持续期间，每秒对敌方目标造成1段伤害并有50%概率随机触发<color=#FF6666>【打断】</color>/<color=#FF6666>【击晕】</color>/<color=#FF6666>【点燃】</color>
【黏胶炸弹】为【爆炸物】
talent_desc_12800574: When [Hallucinogenic Gas] is discarded, it is considered used.\nAfter using [Hallucinogenic Gas], grant rearline allies <color=#7AB2FF>[Invisible]</color>, lasting 5 seconds.
talent_desc_12800576:
When [Hallucinogenic Gas] is in effect:
Reduce frontline allies' Final DMG taken by 25%.
Increase rearline allies' Final DMG dealt by 25%.
Grant <color=#FF6666>[Berserk]</color> to all ally [Mech Units].
talent_desc_12800571: Enhance [Teatime Principle]:\nDraw 1 card, prioritizing a card with [Familiar] term, and instantly gain Cost regenerated over the time equal to the Cost of the drawn card. Increase the duration of the next time-limited [Familiar] by the time equal to the Cost of the drawn card.
talent_desc_12800578: When using [Teatime Principle], for each [Familiar] on the field, additionally gain 0.5 Cost.
talent_desc_12800580: When generating a [Crystal Cluster], each stack heals all allies for 3% of Max HP.
talent_desc_12800583:
At the start of battle, gain +200 ATK and stack 10 layers of [Suppression].
Each layer of [Suppression] reduces own ATK by 20, with a maximum of 10 layers.
After each use of [Collapse] / [Black Feather], Ren removes 1 layer of [Suppression]. When [Suppression] is reduced to 0 layers, Ren enters a [Rampage] status.
During the [Rampage] status, remove 1% of own HP per second, Ren cannot use [Collapse] / [Black Feather] and will convert [Basic Attack] into [Bone Fracture]. Each [Bone Fracture] adds 2 layers of [Suppression].
When [Suppression] stacks up to 10 layers, exit the [Rampage] status.
talent_desc_12800584: During the "Virtual Vision," each layer of <color=#B383FF>"Gaze"</color> increases the Final DMG taken by the enemy unit by 3%, up to a maximum of 30%.
talent_desc_12800585: For each layer of [Suppression] removed, gain 0.5 Costs.\nFor each layer of [Suppression] added, restore 20% HP to the [Glimmer Raven] with the lowest HP.\nFor every 10 layers of [Suppression] added, add a [Black Feather] from the deck or discard pile to your hand.
talent_desc_12800586:
【虚影视界】增强为：
展开【虚影视界】，持续6秒
持续期间：
使我方【使魔】和自身<color=#7AB2FF>【隐形】</color>
使处于<color=#7AB2FF>【隐形】</color>状态的我方造成的最终伤害提高50%
若自身处于【暴走】状态时，将手牌中的【崩裂】丢弃
若自身未处于【暴走】状态时，基于场上【瞵鸦】的数量从牌库或弃牌区将等量的【崩裂】加入手牌，最多3张
talent_desc_12800399: When using [The Star], [The Moon] or [The Sun], determine its position.\nIf it is upright, increase the DMG of [Nova], [Elemental Nova], [Supernova] and [Strange Spark] by 10%, up to a maximum of 100%.\nIf it is reversed, increase the DMG dealt by ally [Familiar] by 10%, up to a maximum of 100%.
talent_desc_12800414: [The Star], [The Moon], [The Sun], [The Tower] and [The Wheel] last 3 seconds longer.
talent_desc_12800588: 1 [The High Priestess] is always contained in the first 5 hand cards at the start of battle.\nWhen [The Star], [The Moon], [The Sun] or [Antediluvian Light] is in effect, heal all allies for 3% of Max HP per second. This effect stacks.
talent_desc_12800589: After using [The Wheel], there's a 50% chance to generate 1 [Strange Spark] in your hand, and it can exceed your max hand size.\nWhen both [Elemental Spire] and [Mors] are present, all [Supernova] and [Strange Spark] in your hand automatically fuse into [Antediluvian Light], and it can exceed your max hand size.

equip_des_11800049: 黑月为特殊战斗人员制造的护甲，在帝国人看来，这种护甲毫无疑问利用了被帝国称为“魔法”的技术，但其原理与帝国却完全不同。
equip_des_11800050: 黑月收藏的另一件古物，并未检测出任何魔法痕迹或者形态场异常，一度被认为只是普通工艺品。但其每一任主人在处于致命危险时，总能奇迹般的化险为夷。且在那之后勾玉都会无预兆得损坏裂开，每次也只是按照修复工艺品的方式将其修复。\n【此装备唯一】
equip_des_11800051: Lying shall be punished by lightning strikes, so it can increase the rate of Electrify.
equip_des_11800054: A technological relic from the Golden Age of the Earth Union, providing maximum protection. BCRL can no longer produce such advanced armor.
equip_des_11800056: A headband worn by Night Chains defectors, featuring a defaced Night Chains symbol symbolizing their resolve for rebellion. In the case of a potent Ascender wearing it, their unwavering determination can imprint the headband, resulting in enigmatic protective properties.
equip_des_11800058: Made from special materials developed by the Empire for resisting arcane energies.
equip_des_11800059: For the sages of the Citadel, knowledge is life. Thus, safeguarding knowledge is akin to safeguarding life itself. They developed such devices to store their memories and wisdom externally, ensuring that even in the event of fatal bodily harm, their lives would endure beyond their physical existence.
equip_des_11800060: 一块未知来源的奇异非晶体化石，其内部闪烁着一个仍在运转的完整星系。经过超高倍率的显微放大后，能观测到其中恒星系运行的轨迹。\n【此装备唯一】
equip_des_11800061: Earth Union scientists propose that the light emanating from the Wishing Tower originates not from the sun, but from a B-type star. Imperial scholars offer a more nuanced perspective, suggesting the presence of a companion star, and they have even harnessed this celestial power to create a magical staff.
equip_des_11800062: A weapon designed by Night Chains for specialized combatants, developed using a similar "magic" technology as the ancient artifact "Kusa Ryujaku." No one knows if Night Chains rediscovered this tech from the artifact, or the skill of crafting such a weapon was never truly lost.
equip_des_11800064: A device originally designed for cooling the Reality Stabilizer during emergencies, later repurposed by security personnel to quell riots. This device has the ability to make metals brittle, proving effective against non-military armor in combat situations.
equip_des_11800065: This device was crafted by a Citadel sage known as "Nictar" before his passing. Although believed to hold the key to the ultimate mystery of the universe, it has never exhibited any known function besides eradicating all life within its range.
equip_des_11800066: Anita researchers studying ball lightning have discovered that it is actually not a standard electrical discharge but rather connected to the collapse of wave functions of elementary particles. This mysterious force can disrupt the structure of matter in an unpredictable manner, even at the particle level. Following the development of this prototype, the Citadel discovered their risky research and confiscated the prototype.
equip_des_11800020: Armor crafted from the bones of Bone Dragons hunted in the heavily polluted regions. It not only provides protection against Chaos Remains but also deters outlaws.
equip_des_11800067: Discovered by a Citadel scholar during his study of acoustics, this phenomenon demonstrates how vibrational frequency influences standing wave patterns on vibrating surfaces. A similar observation was later noted in research on morphic resonance. This device adjusts the user's morphic field to optimize its impact on the target.
equip_des_11800027: A retrieval device for the Fabricate, salvaged by the sages of the Citadel, featuring a central tablet believed to embody the will of the Maze itself.
equip_des_11800068: Exoskeletons designed by Night Chains for specialized combatants. These devices significantly enhance the wearer's defense and strength. While this may appear contradictory to Night Chains' typical secretive nature, even they must confront formidable foes directly on occasion.
equip_des_11800078: Upon first entering Mundus, the Empire experienced plague, famine, war, and severe cold. Later, the people of the Empire overcame these four disasters and crafted this amulet, symbolizing the sealing of these four calamities. Although the Empire did not rely solely on magic to overcome these disasters, the significance represented by the amulet still endows it with special magical power.

skill_detailDescription_12300683: 伤害：1357%（混响）×弃牌区卡牌数量
skill_description_12300725: 传送1颗苹果，对敌方目标造成1段伤害并<color=#FF6666>【击晕】</color>，同时触发<color=#B383FF>【混乱】</color>\n抽1张牌，优先紫卡\n同时丢弃手牌中的【果核】，每丢弃1张，额外抽1张牌
skill_description_12302011: At the start of battle, convert 5% ATK of the ally with highest DEF to this character's ATK.\nWhen taking DMG, transfer 25% of the DMG taken to the ally with highest DEF.
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12303090: Cooldown: 35 seconds. Whenever generating a [Nova], [Elemental Nova], [Supernova] or [Strange Spark], reduce the cooldown by 5 seconds. Whenever gaining a Stargazer's skill card, reduce the cooldown by 10 seconds.
skill_description_12303434:
Summon the Astral Familiar [Mors], lasting 9 seconds. During this period:
[Mors] releases a Quietus Ripple per second that <color=#FF6666>[Penetrates]</color> enemies, dealing DMG to all enemies once and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color>.
When [The Star], [The Moon], [The Sun] or [The Tower] is in effect, increase the attack speed of [Mors] by 50%, up to 200%.
[Mors's] DMG attribute cycles between Frost, Fire and Electro.
Whenever [Mors] deals DMG, inflict <color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>, <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color> and <color=#FFB800>[Thunder]</color> in sequence.
[Mors] is a [Familiar].
[Mors] inherits Margiela the Stargazer's ATK.
Quietus Ripple is a [Wave].
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12303434: Cooldown: 35 seconds. Whenever generating a [Nova], [Elemental Nova], [Supernova] or [Strange Spark], reduce the cooldown by 5 seconds. Whenever gaining a Stargazer's skill card, reduce the cooldown by 10 seconds.
skill_description_12303440: By the illumination of Sirius, gain 1 Cost per second, lasting #r seconds.\nDuring this period, inflict <color=#FFB800>[Thunder]</color> on the enemy with the highest HP once per second.\nThis card is [Destroyed] when used, then generate 1 [Nova] in your hand.
skill_description_12303441: Encage all enemies within the moon and inflict <color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>, lasting #r seconds.\nDuring this period, deal DMG to all enemies once per second and inflict <color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>.\nThis card is [Destroyed] when used, then generate 1 [Nova] in your hand.
skill_description_12303442: Release 1 solar wheel, dealing DMG once per second and inflicting <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>, lasting #r seconds.\nThis card is [Destroyed] when used, then generate 1 [Nova] in your hand.
skill_description_12303463: Increases Max HP by 5%. For each [Familiar] on the field, this character takes 5% less Final DMG, up to a maximum of 35%.
skill_description_12303462: Increase the DMG dealt by Orange cards by 50%. For each card in the discard pile, further increase the DMG by 1%.
skill_description_12303461: Increase ally [Familiar] DMG by 20%. For each [Familiar] on the field, further increase the DMG by 3%, up to a maximum of 50%.

talent_desc_12800028:
【禁果】增强为：
传送1颗苹果，对敌方目标造成1段伤害并<color=#FF6666><color=#FF6666>【击晕】</color></color>，同时触发<color=#B383FF><color=#B383FF>【混乱】</color></color>
抽1张牌，优先紫卡
同时丢弃手牌中的【果核】，每丢弃1张，额外抽1张牌
talent_desc_12800356: When HP is below 70%/30%, become <color=#7AB2FF>[Invisible]</color> for 5s, can be triggered only once.
equip_des_11800079: 包含了一根神秘生物羽毛的魔杖，就有强大的力量。据说世界上还存在另一根用同样羽毛制造的魔杖，那一根是雄的，你这根是雌的，两根魔杖相遇后便会失去力量。\n【此装备唯一】
equip_des_11800080: 一块具有神奇力量的水晶石，据说持有它的人能从中汲取源源不断的力量，因此也被误传为拥有治愈甚至复生之力。\n【此装备唯一】
equip_des_11800081: Multipurpose familiar armor, providing comprehensive protection for familiars of different sizes and shapes. Small ones can hide inside, large ones can wear it outside!
tag_detail_12601698: Apply 1 stack of [Frostbite] on the target. Each stack of [Frostbite] increases/decreases the target's Final DMG taken/dealt by 3% for 6s.\nWhen stacked to a maximum of 3 stacks, it triggers [Shattered Crystal], dealing 1 hit of DMG to the target, while triggering [Freeze] and removing all stacks of [Frostbite].
tag_detail_12601791: Increases the target's final damage taken by 15% for 5 seconds.

Generates planetary remains in the target area, lasting 5s.
During this period:
Pull all enemies and stack [Space Rend] toward the center each second.
Each stack of [Space Rend] deals 1 hit of DMG to the target and increases the Final DMG received by the target by 15%, while triggering <color=#FF6666>[Erode]</color>.
Remove all stacks of [Space Rend] after the duration ends.
[Boundless Abyss] is [Wave].
[Destroy] when played.

[Katsuobushi Rocket] is [Explosive].

Summon the skeletal familiar [Phlegethon]
Each time a card is drawn, deal DMG to all enemies over the number of hits based on the cost of the drawn card and cause <color=#FF6666>[Knockback]</color>, while triggering <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color> once, effective 3 times

skill_description_12303493:
Summon the shadow familiar [Nyx] to possess an enemy unit for 10 seconds.
During the duration:
Each second, randomly trigger <color=#FFB800>Thunder</color>/<color=#FF6666>Blaze</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>Frostbite</color> on the enemy unit once.
Each time a special effect is triggered on the enemy unit, deal 1 hit of DMG to the enemy unit.
The special effects that [Nyx] responds to include:
<color=#FFB800>[Thunder]</color>/<color=#FFB800>[Bolt]</color>/<color=#FFB800>[Magnetize]</color>/<color=#FFB800>[Paralysis]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Blaze]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Rend]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Scorch]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Interrupt]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Stun]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Knockback]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Launch]</color>
[Nyx] is a [Familiar].
[Nyx] inherits Masaki's ATK.

Each stack of [Holy Crown] increases the DMG dealt by the target's [Familiar] by 10%, and also increases the DMG of Ultimate cards without [Familiar] term by 10%, up to 5 stacks.
If the target's [Holy Crown] stacks have reached the limit, draw 1 card, prioritizing target ally's skill cards.
When switching [Pope] target, remove all [Holy Crown] stacks.
[Destroy] when played.

Each time you gain [Empress] / [Emperor] / [Hierophant], determine the orientation of the selected card.
If it is upright, summon 1 [Royal Guard] to join the battle.
If it is reversed, summon 1 [Shadow Lancer] to join the battle.
[Royal Guard] / [Shadow Lancer] are [Familiars] that collaborate with fire attribute/ice attribute [Basic Attack], with a maximum of 6.
The ATK of [Royal Guard] / [Shadow Lancer] equals Masaki's ATK, and their HP equals 33% of Masaki's HP.
talent_desc_12800597:
[Chariot]enhanced to: 
Summon the skeletal Familiar [Fragron]to join the battle
Each time a card is drawn, based on the Cost of the drawn card, charge and deal the same number of hits of DMG to all enemies and <color=#FF6666>[Knockback]</color>, while triggering x1 <color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>, effective for 3 times
After [Fragron]'s charge ends, it transforms into [Cocytus], causing all enemies to <color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>, while protecting our side from DMG
Black card Cost is considered as 5
[Fragron] / [Cocytus] are [Familiars]
[Fragron]'s ATK equals Masaki's ATK
[Cocytus]'s HP equals the current HP of the ally with the highest HP

For every 39 hits dealt by [Demon], generate 1 [Dark Fruit] added to your hand, and it can exceed the hand cap.
If [Dark Fruit] and [Shadowcraft] are in your hand, they will automatically merge into [Abyss of Infinity], and it can exceed the hand cap.

equip_des_11800040: 召唤自己的祖父年轻时的投影，使其代为承受攻击。但因为祖父悖论的存在，攻击会被排除到世界线之外。\n【此装备唯一】
equip_des_11800084: 学会曾经生产的一种民用产品，能够自然变得光亮的餐刀，其分子具有巨大的水平方向连接能力，因此会调整处于垂直方向的分子缓慢移动到水平方向，使其表面保持光亮。但也会使其刀刃变得越来越锋利直至变成单分子状态。几次事故后被投诉停产。\n【此装备唯一】

equip_des_11800261: An ancient weapon of unknown origin acquired by the Citadel from the chaos space. It emits gravitons and possesses destructive power akin to the fusion of black holes. Through modifications made by the Citadel, it can be easily wielded by humans. Theoretically, if the Citadel were to create a more potent version, it could potentially even obliterate The Secondary Moon.\n [This equipment is unique.]
equip_des_11800021: The magical echoes of the dawn's wishing directly infused into the material of the armor, giving it the ability to restore vitality. Since this material has only been manufactured once in history, it is extremely rare.\n[This equipment is unique.]

[Green]: Increases the Leader's attack power by 0.05% of the highest HP among allies, up to a maximum of 150, for 10 seconds.
[Red]: Increases the Leader's attack power by 2% of the highest attack power among allies, up to a maximum of 75, for 10 seconds.
[Blue]: Increases the Leader's attack power by 2% of the highest defense among allies, up to a maximum of 75, for 10 seconds.

[Green]: Increases the Leader's ATK by 0.05% of the highest HP ally's current HP, up to 150, for 10 seconds.
[Red]: Increases the Leader's ATK by 2% of the highest ATK ally's ATK, up to 75, for 10 seconds.
[Blue]: Increases the Leader's ATK by 2% of the highest DEF ally's DEF, up to 75, for 10 seconds.
[Yellow]: When using the [Leader Skill], gain 1 Cost for 10 seconds.
[Purple]: Recover 1 card from discard pile pile to your Cards, prioritizing the Leader's skill cards, excluding this card.
After [Prismatic Gem] triggers All effects or when its duration ends, generate 1 [Strange Spark] and play it immediately, triggering <color=#B383FF>[Curse]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>/<color=#FFB800>[Bolt]</color>/<color=#B383FF>[Sleep]</color> in order according to the illuminated colors.
skill_description_12303908: Add up to 3 Black cards from the deck to your Cards\nIf there are none, draw 1 card\nAfterward, Destroy
skill_description_12303914: When you gain this card, <color=#FF6666>[Corrupt]</color> all enemies and draw 1 card, prioritizing the leader's skill card.\nAfter 10 seconds, discard this card.\nThis card cannot be [Destroy] / [Transform].
skill_description_12303915:
Unleash [Mirror of Decisions], lasts for 6 seconds
During this time, reflects 50% of enemy DMG
After the duration ends, deals 1-stage Reverengy DMG to all enemies
The higher the sum of all allies' HP limits/self-defense, the higher the DMG
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12303915: Cooldown of 30 seconds, each time you gain a Black card, the cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
skill_description_12303916: Choose 1 card from [Trailblaze] / [Veinview] / [Abyssal Draw] to add to your Cards\nAfterward, generate a Black card [Reverengy] in your deck
skill_description_12303905: Healing 1 ally unit for 50% HP, and add up to three 3-cost or lower Skill Cards from discard pile pile to your Cards.\nAfterward, [Destroy]
skill_description_12303917: Generate 3 [Shadowcraft] to your Cards, and can exceed the max hand size\nUse then [Destroy]
skill_description_12303924: This card can't be used. Whenever you gain a Red card, reduce this card's Cost by 1. When this effect triggers 5 times, [Destroy] this card, grant all allies [Prisoner] effect, and remove [Caged Beast] effect from the enemy.\n[Prisoner]: Increase Max HP by 100% and reduce healing received by 50%. This effect can't be dispelled.
skill_description_12303929:
Create an Instant Freeze storm in the target area, reducing the attack power of enemy units within range by 3%, up to a maximum of 36%
and dealing 9 hits of DMG, while triggering <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Rend]</color>
The higher the sum of the HP of [Symbiosis] targets and itself/the higher its own attack power, the greater the DMG
Afterward, [Coiling] transforms into [Cold Light]
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12303929: 冷却时间30秒，每次使用卡牌，冷却时间缩短3秒；每次使用自身或【共生】目标的技能牌，冷却时间额外缩短3秒
skill_description_12303934: Add all [Symbiosis] from the deck to your Cards.\nIf none, add a [Symbiosis] skill card from the deck or Discarded to your Cards and play it immediately.
skill_description_12303935:
Restore 33% HP to itself and the [Symbiosis] target, and it can exceed the HP limit.
At the same time, each [Pam] deals one instance of Reverengy DMG to all enemies.
The higher the combined HP of the [Symbiosis] target and itself / the higher the average attack power of the [Symbiosis] target, the higher the DMG.
This card is [Destroyed] when it leaves your hand.
skill_description_12303936:
Use 1 [Palm] to [Symbiosis] with an ally unit, excluding itself.
Destroy Afterward.
[Symbiosis] increases both Doraemis and the target's maximum HP by 25%. [Palm] cooperates with the Basic Attack, dealing 2 hits of DMG to the enemy unit.
The higher the [Symbiosis] target's HP/attack power, the higher the DMG.
skill_description_12303937: Absorb [Pam]'s power, spear thrust, dealing 3 hits of DMG to all enemies, while triggering <color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>\nThe higher the combined HP of the [Symbiosis] target and self / the higher the self's attack power, the higher the DMG\nAfterward, [Cold Glint] transforms into [Entangle]
skill_leaderCardConditionDesc_12303937: 冷却时间30秒，每次使用卡牌，冷却时间缩短3秒；每次使用自身或【共生】目标的技能牌，冷却时间额外缩短3秒
skill_description_12303950: Release one [707] to follow the ally unit, absorb enemy HP and convert it into our <color=#7AB2FF>[shield]</color>. It will be retrieved after 10 seconds.\n[707] is a [drone].
skill_description_12303951: 使带有【无人机】词条的卡牌伤害提高15%，上限150%\n累计使用10次后，此卡全部【销毁】
skill_description_12303952: Play a random card with the Deploy: Drone effect three times.
break_desc_12100860: Our side causes <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Megafreeze]</color>, own ATK +0.3%/+0.6%/+1.5%/+3%, up to 99%.
break_desc_12100891: When we inflict <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Megafreeze]</color>, it deals 1/2/3/4 segments of Frost DMG to the enemy unit with the highest HP.
break_desc_12100894: The cap of [Extract the Essence] is increased to 100%
break_name_12100896: Spring breeze and drizzle nurture all things
break_desc_12100896: Each time [Songfu Extreme Bond] deals DMG, it restores 1% HP to the ally with the lowest HP.
break_desc_12100898: Each stack of [威压]increases self's Final DMG by 7%
break_desc_12100899: Triggers x1 every 14 seconds. When taking DMG, deploy the [Mecha Force Field] to reduce DMG taken by all allies by 49% for 7 seconds.
break_desc_12100900: Each time we inflict <color=#FF6666>[Rend]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Slash]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Pierce]</color>/<color=#B383FF>[Corrode]</color>/<color=#FFB800>[Devour Energy]</color>, our ATK increases by 0.5%, up to a maximum of 98%.
break_desc_12100902: For each Red/Blue/Purple card costing 2 or more that is used, randomly launch 1 [Rock Breaker Floating Drill] / [Heart Piercer Floating Drill].
break_desc_12100905: For every 5% increase over the initial HP limit, our Final DMG is increased by 1%, up to a maximum of 60%.
break_desc_12100909: [Lumino Gem]Each time the effect is triggered, there is a 33% chance to deal 1 segment of Reverb DMG to all enemies, while randomly triggering <color=#FFB800>[Lightning]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Ignite]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>\nThe higher the total HP/average attack power of all allies, the higher the DMG.
break_desc_12100910: For each Luminescent Gemstone generated, draw 1 card, prioritizing the skill card with the highest attack power on our side.\nDuring the duration of the Luminescent Gemstone, the Final DMG dealt by Derivatives is increased by 50%.
break_desc_12100907: Each time [Lumino] restores, it simultaneously increases the target's attack power by 0.5%, up to a maximum of 50%.
break_desc_12100914: For each Black card in the deck/discard pile/hand, the leader's attack and defense increase by 15, up to a maximum of 150.
break_desc_12100916: For every card generated, maximum HP +5%, up to 300% \nFor every card recycled, attack and defense +1%, up to 60%
break_desc_12100919: Each time you gain [Hook], our Reverengy DMG increases by 3%, up to a maximum of 60%.
break_desc_12100924: [Dredge]When in hand, max hand size +1\n\n[Dredge]When in discard pile zone, gain 0.1 Costs per second, can stack
break_desc_12100922: For every 3 points of [Synchronization] gained, increase own attack power by 1%, up to a maximum of 99%\nAt the same time, share one-third of this effect with teammates who have [Symbiosis].
break_desc_12100923: Every time you gain 200 [Tuning] points, generate 1 [Fluff] and add it to your Cards, which may exceed the max hand size.
break_desc_12100926: For each target not linked with Symbiosis, the user's Final DMG is increased by 20%, stackable.\nFor each target already linked with Symbiosis, the target's Final DMG is increased by 20%, stackable.
break_desc_12100928: Each time you use [Symbiosis], immediately gain 50 [Harmony] points.\nWhen [Harmony] points reach 100, generate 1 [Symbiosis] to your Cards, exceeding the max hand size, x1.
break_desc_12100933: Our drone has a 20% chance to be released x1 additionally.
break_desc_12100936: 每次有【无人机】释放时，该【无人机】持有者攻击力+1.5%，上限60%
break_desc_12100937: 每次使用带有【无人机】词条的卡牌时，有25%概率从牌库将1张带有【无人机】词条的卡牌加入手牌
break_desc_12100938: 每有1张带有【无人机】词条的卡牌，我方【无人机】伤害提高7%
talent_name_12800620: Hide one's abilities and bide one's time
talent_desc_12800620: After using [Winter's End], it causes a Megafreeze on the enemy field and adds 1 Blue from the deck to your hand.
talent_name_12800621: From the outside to the inside
talent_desc_12800621: At the start of battle, for each Blue in the deck, the Leader Skill cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds/[Essence Extraction] duration is extended by 1 second.
talent_name_12800623: The tide is like a dream
talent_desc_12800623: At the start of battle, for each Blue card in the deck, Tide's DMG increases by 10%, stackable up to a limit of 150%. \nEach time a Blue card is used, it deals DMG to all enemies equal to its Cost and triggers <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>.
talent_desc_12800624: After using [Essence Extraction], draw 2 cards, prioritizing those with the <color=#7AB2FF>[Chill]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Frostbite]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Megafreeze]</color> terms.
talent_desc_12800625: Restore 7% of the DMG dealt as HP, and this can exceed the HP limit, up to a maximum of 390%\nWhen taking DMG, deal physical DMG equal to 70% of your own maximum HP to the target.
talent_desc_12800626: Among the first 5 hand cards at the start of battle, there must be 1 [Intimidation]\nWhen triggering <color=#FFB800>[Energy Devour]</color>, for each layer of [Intimidation] on the target, gain an additional 0.1 Costs and deal an extra hit of DMG
talent_desc_12800628: When you gain a total of 7 cards from the deck during each rotation, immediately activate your own Leader Skill or directly use Mecha Roar x1, while increasing your own attack and defense by +49, up to 3 times.
talent_desc_12800629: Each hit has a 7% chance to trigger <color=#B383FF>[Corrosion]</color>, excluding special effects related to DMG.
talent_desc_12800636: [Prismatic Gem] After triggering all effects or when the duration ends, generate 1 [Strange Spark] and play it directly.\nSimultaneously trigger <color=#B383FF>[Curse]</color>/<color=#FF6666>[Wildfire]</color>/<color=#7AB2FF>[Freeze]</color>/<color=#FFB800>[Bolt]</color>/<color=#B383FF>[Sleep]</color> in order according to the lit colors.
talent_desc_12800638: At the start of battle, directly unleash x1 [Radiance].
talent_desc_12800639: Each time the deck is emptied and a Shuffle is triggered, place 1 [Gem Box] on top of the deck.
talent_desc_12800645: For each [Angel] on our field, increase self HP limit by 100%, and transfer 50% of the DMG taken by [Angel] to self.\nIf there are no [Angels] on our field, all allies' HP limit is increased by 20%.
talent_desc_12800646: For each Black card generated, there's a 10% chance to draw one card.
talent_desc_12800647: After using [Insight], add 1 [Reflection] from the deck or discard pile to your Cards.
talent_desc_12800648: [Exploration]When in hand, each time the captain hits, triggers <color=#FF6666>[Erode]</color>, excluding special effects related to DMG.
talent_desc_12800651: Make the ally unit with [Symbiosis] share [Survival Instinct]
talent_desc_12800652: Self and [Pam] gain [Resonance] points with each hit\nEvery 5 [Resonance] points gained, gain 0.33 Costs\nEvery 50 [Resonance] points gained, immediately activate own [Leader Skill]
talent_desc_12800653: When the target of [Symbiosis] uses a skill card, [Pam] performs a coordinated attack, dealing double DMG segments to the enemy unit based on the Cost of the card, excluding [Leader Skill].\nThe higher the HP/attack power of the [Symbiosis] target, the higher the DMG.
talent_desc_12800654: When HP is below 50%, restore 3% of your HP per second.
talent_desc_12800656: 使用【甜菜反应堆】后，立即重置场上我方【无人机】的持续时间，每架【无人机】限1次
talent_desc_12800657: After using [Siphon Defender], add 1 card with the [Drone] term from the Discarded to your Cards, this card is excluded.
talent_desc_12800658: 开局将2张带有【无人机】词条的卡牌加入手牌\n每次有【无人机】释放时，发射1枚【葫萝卜火箭】，回复生命值最低的1名我方5%生命值
talent_desc_12800659: Gain 0.1 Costs per second for each [drone] on our field.
equip_des_11800089: 中火焰的魔剑，也是帝国代表正义的图腾，传说其火焰只会焚烧罪恶的灵魂。
equip_des_11800090: Attached the wind to the surface of the armor, the high-speed flowing air can deflect the direction of attacks.
equip_des_11800091: 此非凡钻头乃机械教廷神圣意志的延伸，当它开始轰鸣，即是异端的丧钟敲响——以无可阻挡的螺旋之力，撕裂虚伪，贯穿顽抗，执行那不容置疑的神之裁决。凡尘壁垒，在它面前皆如薄纸。裁决已定，唯螺旋永行。\n【此装备唯一】

tag_detail_12601801: [Extinction] ignites the target, dealing 1 hit of Fire DMG per second that ignores DEF, lasting 6s.
tag_detail_12601841: [Megafreeze] causes the target within range to become completely immobilized, while Energy and HP stop recovering for 6 seconds. During this period, the target's DEF is halved.
tag_detail_12601868: Deal DMG once per second, lasting 7 seconds. During the duration, reduce the target's DEF by 7%.
tag_detail_12601869: Absorb target energy to gain 0.1 Cost and deal 1 hit of DMG. If the target is a large enemy, additionally gain 0.25 Cost.
tag_detail_12601870: Deal 1 hit of DMG to the target and ignore 50% of the target's DEF. If the target's HP is below 50%, this DMG is increased by 200%.
tag_detail_12601880: Each time [Radiance] restores, it simultaneously increases the target's attack power by 0.5%, up to a maximum of 50%.
comments.auth_failed: Anonymous sign-in failed. Check Firebase Authentication settings.
equip_des_11800092: Made in private by an Anita researcher. Causes sickness after consuming, but increases the user's resistance against Reverengy.
equip_des_11800093: A light, a life incarnate. Its crafting method is considered the ultimate taboo. All related information, including its creator, is now sealed in the deepest of the Fabricate.
equip_des_11800094: A device used for imbuing knowledge to human brain through heavy smash, though always results in tragedies. Few people can endure both the physical impact from the device and the mental impact from the influx of knowledge. Now used by Source Citadel as a mere weapon.
equip_des_11800095: Wearing it means to accept the fate of a Tower Knight, along with its burden.
equip_des_11800099: "How many steps are needed to put this shield into a refrigerator?" Such is the rumored question favored by big shots. It embodies their unique consideration.
equip_des_11800108: The predecessor of this stun gun emitted a soul-shattering, spine-tingling scream during use. Precisely because of this overly mysterious situation, it was mandated for improvement. Yet that scream was so deeply etched in memory that people still stubbornly refer to it as X-27, as if the model number still carries the echo of its past.
equip_des_11800109: One of BCRL's standard-issue equipment, characterized by its simple structure and plain design, frequently employed in combat and suppression against human and other humanoid targets.
equip_des_11800279: A ring of unknown origin, said to have belonged to the missing King of the Empire and inscribed with a covenant made with Arthu Jin. It is said to summon powerful servants.\n[Only one of this equipment can be equipped in the same lineup.]
